Headline: #96 Lunt Temporary Westbound Reroute near Lunt/Magolia
ShortDescription: Westbound 96 Lunt buses are temporarily rerouted via Sheridan, Touhy, Ashland and Lunt: due to, street blockage near Lunt/Magnolia.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #96 Lunt buses are temporarily rerouted via Sheridan, Touhy, Ashland and Lunt: due to, street blockage near Lunt/Magnolia.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Purple Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to debris on the tracks.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to debris on the tracks.

Shuttle buses are available  from Howard to Linden to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#201 Central/Ridge

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.
